title: Access View Item in a shared map view
excerpt:

posts.author: JRooney (Jennifer Rooney)
posts.cookedHtml:
In a shared view map the user sees a pin for the location, item name as defined, location and the “ability” to view item.

In an internal setting this works great to see the details of the item. However, in a shared external view the “view item” button does nothing creating an issue for the user.

We would like the functionality to either activate the button so one can access the board details - this would be a simple fix with the ability to input the shared board link.

We considered using cards but there is no relation to the selected pin and the card for that item. If you could have the two interact that would be a viable option as well.

Other Improvements.

  • Option to hide the “view item” button.
  • Ability to link a google map to the location.
  • Ability to remove the Monday branding on the upper left corner of any shared board and replace with our company’s branding
